clauses.clause_summary: Consent obtained before processing personal data of children.
clauses.evidence: No mention of consent for children's data in the document.

clauses.clause_summary: Right to access information about personal data.
clauses.evidence: Document mentions 'a summary of personal data' and 'identities of all other Data Fiduciaries'.

clauses.clause_summary: Right to correction and erasure of personal data.
clauses.evidence: Document mentions 'correction, completion, updating' of personal data.
No mention of grievance redressal in the document.

clauses.clause_summary: Data retention and deletion policy defined.
clauses.evidence: Document mentions 'monthly audits' but no specific data retention/deletion policy.
No mention of privacy notice in the document.
Document does not mention consent for data collection.

clauses.clause_summary: Purpose of data collection clearly stated.
clauses.evidence: Document mentions 'intended use' but no specific purpose stated.

pii_findings.recommendation: Ensure that only authorized personnel have access to enterprise transaction records.
Implement email encryption and secure communication protocols.
Use phone number anonymization techniques in data storage and transmission.
Do not collect, store, or use Aadhaar numbers for any purpose.
Do not collect, store, or use PAN numbers for any purpose.
Use address anonymization techniques in data storage and transmission.
Implement IP address anonymization techniques in data storage and transmission.
Use location anonymization techniques in data storage and transmission.
Do not collect, store, or use health data for any purpose.
Do not collect, store, or use financial data for any purpose.
Do not collect, store, or use biometric data for any purpose.
Implement device ID anonymization techniques in data storage and transmission.
Use cookie anonymization techniques in data storage and transmission.
Implement browsing history anonymization techniques in data storage and transmission.
Do not collect, store, or use date of birth for any purpose.

summary: Audit complete. Review individual clause results.
